channel.title: Culture on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in Culture on Maharlikanism

item.title: Palmistry as an Integral Part of Maharlikan Culture
item.description: Among Filipino spiritual beliefs, the concept of “Kapalaran” (fate, destiny, luck) is fundamental.

item.title: War on Adobo
item.description: An important advoacy of Maharlikanism is the introduction of Maharlikan food as an alternative to the unhealthy Filipino food. The latter is made up of meats and oils from Spanish influence, as well as salty condiments from Chinese influence.

item.title: Bayong Bola
item.description:
Basketball was invented in America by James Naismith as an indoor ball sports.

The problem is that it puts the goal above human height level. This makes it advantageous to tall races like Africans and Europeans. This deprives other shorter races of the chance to excel in the game. This lowers sports activity which could have improved health and teamwork.
